headline: P&L exposure: ₹4,271 Cr direct profit uplift (engine estimate) + ₹500-1,000 Cr potential green capex (engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is confined to Adani Power's direct operational and financial performance.

P/E multiple may see modest expansion (0.05-0.1x, engine estimate) as a result of earnings surprise; direct cashflow uplift of ₹4,271 Cr (engine estimate) supports higher valuation and reduces leverage risk.

Stronger earnings can lower Adani Power's cost of capital by 20-40 bps (engine estimate), as investor confidence rises and bond spreads tighten; potential for increased FII inflow if momentum is sustained.
